prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 西藏大学在广西物理类2024年最低位次约46144名，2025年降至约59559名，一年间后移约13415名，降幅显著，显示报考热度明显下降。2025年基准位次约59559名；该校在广西物理类招生计划2024年为3人，2025年大幅扩招至12人，2026年计划维持12人，与2025年持平。计划从2024到2025年的大幅扩招是位次后移的重要原因，2026年计划持平，扩招效应消退。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西藏大学是国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜排名约第195名（2025年），2026年未进入前200名，排名近年略有下滑，整体处于211中下游水平；该校在抖音平台热度排名第30位，评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量较高，但声誉文件中未见明显正面或负面舆情事件，报考心理影响中性。历史投档异常记录中无西藏大学相关信号；西藏大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，整体学科实力偏弱，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业含计算机科学与技术（社会热度偏热）、交通运输（热度一般）、资源勘查工程（生化环材类明显劝退）等。广西2026年高考总考生约39.2万人，较2025年约38万人增加约3.2%，按比例估算物理类考生约26.9万人（较2025年26万人增约3.3%），竞争略有加剧。省控线方面，广西物理类本科批2024年371分、2025年370分，基本持平；西藏大学位于西藏拉萨，距广西较远，跨省报考存在地域偏好减分；该校在本省（西藏）招生占比极高，在广西招生人数较少（2025年物理类12人），属于外省小规模招生，位次易受报考波动影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In Guangxi Physics Category, Tibet University's minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 46,144, dropping to about 59,559 in 2025, a significant decline of about 13,415 places in one year, indicating a notable decrease in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 59,559. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category was 3 students in 2024, greatly expanded to 12 students in 2025, and the 2026 plan remains at 12 students, unchanged from 2025. The substantial expansion from 2024 to 2025 is a major reason for the ranking decline, and with the 2026 plan unchanged, the expansion effect has subsided.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 195th on the Soft Science main ranking (2025), and not entering the top 200 in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years, overall at the middle-to-lower level among 211 universities. On Douyin platform, it ranks 30th in popularity, rated as 'relatively hot', with high short video exposure, but no significant positive or negative public opinion events are found in reputation documents, resulting in a neutral impact on application psychology. There are no signals related to Tibet University in historical abnormal admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Tibet University has no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating weak overall academic strength and limited appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category majors include Computer Science and Technology (socially popular), Transportation (average popularity), and Resource Exploration Engineering (clearly discouraging in the biochemistry-environmental-materials category). In 2026, Guangxi's total number of college entrance exam takers is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.2% from approximately 380,000 in 2025. By proportion, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 269,000 (an increase of about 3.3% from 260,000 in 2025), indicating slightly intensified competition. Regarding provincial control lines, Guangxi Physics Category undergraduate batch scores were 371 in 2024 and 370 in 2025, essentially unchanged. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, far from Guangxi, and cross-province applications suffer from regional preference deductions. The university enrolls a very high proportion of students within its own province (Tibet), with a small number of students in Guangxi (12 in Physics Category in 2025), making it a small-scale enrollment from other provinces, and rankings are susceptible to application fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking decline in 2025, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025 (expansion effect subsided), a slight increase in Guangxi Physics Category candidates (slightly intensified competition), the university's low level and lack of advantageous disciplines, and average Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to decline slightly from the 2025 baseline of 59,559. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 59,759, with a range of 59,259 to 60,259.

- Transportation (Najin Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- English (Heba Lin Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 59,259–60,259, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology as a reach, and Tier 3 Resource Exploration Engineering and English as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<59,259), prioritize reaching for Computer Science and Technology; for rankings near the upper bound (>60,259), mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: In Guangxi History Category, the lowest ranking for Tibet University in 2024 was approximately 8322, dropping to about 10382 in 2025, a decline of about 2060 positions in one year, a significant decrease. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10382; the enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi was 2 students in 2024, significantly expanded to 7 students in 2025, and the 2026 plan remains at 7 students, unchanged from 2025. The large expansion from 2024 to 2025 is a major reason for the ranking decline, and with the 2026 plan unchanged, the expansion effect subsides.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 195th on the Soft Science main ranking (2025), and not entering the top 200 in 2026, overall at the middle-to-lower level among 211 universities; its Douyin popularity ranking is 30th, rated as 'relatively hot', but the reputation file shows no significant positive or negative public opinion, with a neutral impact on application psychology. No historical abnormal admission records; Tibet University has no A- or above level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with overall weak academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category majors include Law (social popularity: relatively hot/recommended), English (teacher training, foreign language category: generally wait-and-see), Ideological and Political Education (teacher training), Taxation, and Public Finance (finance category: differentiated wait-and-see). The total number of examinees in Guangxi in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.2% from about 380,000 in 2025, with an estimated History Category examinee count of about 123,000 (up about 3.3% from 119,000 in 2025), leading to slightly intensified competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Guangxi History Category undergraduate batch was 400 points in 2024 and 402 points in 2025, a slight increase; Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, far from Guangxi, with cross-province application having a regional preference disadvantage; the number of History Category enrollments in Guangxi is small (7 in 2025), a small-scale enrollment from another province, making rankings susceptible to application fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking decline trend in 2025, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025 (expansion effect fading), a slight increase in Guangxi History Category examinees (slightly intensified competition), the university's relatively low level and lack of advantageous disciplines, and the relatively hot popularity of Law potentially attracting some applicants, it is expected that the lowest ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decline from the 2025 baseline of 10382. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 10462, with a range of 9962 to 10962.
